case_title: JOHN BEDELL VS. CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY BEDELL, JOHN DBA JOHN BEDELL PHOTOGRAPHY AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE GERPHEIDE, HEIDI (PUBLISHER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDELL, JOHN DBA JOHN BEDELL PHOTOGRAPHY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO APR-02-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. " NEITHER DEFENDANTS HAS BEEN SERVED; BUT, PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS. HOWEVER, DEFENDANTS DID NOT APPEAR TODAY FOR HEARING TO CONFIRM THE STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS THEY CAN SERVE DEFENDANTS FOR HEARING ON APRIL 2, 2014", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDELL, JOHN DBA JOHN BEDELL PHOTOGRAPHY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $145.00) SERVED JAN-17-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDELL, JOHN DBA JOHN BEDELL PHOTOGRAPHY
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-27-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE $145.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDELL, JOHN DBA JOHN BEDELL PHOTOGRAPHY AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA HOMES MAGAZINE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDELL, JOHN DBA JOHN BEDELL PHOTOGRAPHY
ORDER SC-152 ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL *GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-16-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT HEIDI GERPHEIDE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED -
